label: The external benchmark-family suite covers 90/90 declared optimizer motifs across 12 families; each motif has a deterministic-catalog validation representative.
The generated probes execute on DuckDB and PostgreSQL with zero failures for the full corpus and the motif representatives.
Every finite theorem obligation asserted in the paper is checked by the artifact.
The grounded mainline contains 287 verified rules, 287 evidence spans, and 26 sources.
OptSemBench-C generates 4,216 probes covering 7,112 renderable feature interactions.
Keyword projection fabricates 254 false equivalences among 2,284 declared equivalences.
Operator-only projection fabricates 238 false equivalences among 2,268 declared equivalences.
Exact contract comparison produces zero false equivalences.
The baseline suite contains 17 executable projections, including one-field adversarial baselines and strengthened matrix baselines.
The layer+placement semantic basis repairs all 498 false equivalences across headline projections.
Repair certificates are sufficient and minimal under finite enumeration and hitting-set checks.
Keyword and operator-only false equivalence remain nonzero after removing any single public source.
